_comment: ORION orchestrator monitor manifest. Durable record of the watcher set this instance EXPECTS running; reconcile against the live /tasks list at session-start / post-compact / post-resume (clacks/monitor-hygiene.md). Machine-local; not committed. Re-arm & refresh task-id on reconcile — never blind-re-arm.

monitors.target: WS-33 Mobile UX & Navigation — Cosmo Stage/State (page id 3918bce9-1f7c-81ae-97c1-d15ad8951beb)
monitors.purpose: Central lifecycle backstop for PRG-33: catch review verdicts (Closed vs rework→Executing), human-holds (State→Blocked/Awaiting Info), graduation signal. Independent of the Clacks channel.
Catch shepherd → orchestrator Clacks traffic (needs-operator / needs-orchestrator / blocked / decision). Armed pre-launch so the first shepherd event isn't missed.
